content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (after iter-008)

## P1 — Coverage debt: blueprint the 21 new `lean_aux` helpers (planner authors prose)
`archon dag-query unmatched` = 21; all are this iter's proven, axiom-clean helpers. Suggested
labels + `\uses` are spelled out verbatim in both task results — copy them.

**Basic.tex** (12, "relativeProj single-chart model", realising `def:relative-proj` step 3):
`projChartFrameSubst`, `_isHomogeneous`, `projChartFrameHom`, `_apply`, `projChartFrameSubst_comp`,
`projChartFrameHom_comp`, `_one`, `_irrelevant_le`, `projChartFrameMap_congr`, `projChartFrameMap`,
`projChartFrameMap_comp`, `projChartFrameMapIso`. (Labels in `task_results/.../Basic.lean.md`.)

**Functors.tex** (9, extend the existing `def:grass-trans-*` GlueData-helper section):
`grassOverlapRing2`, `grassOverlapToTriple`, `grassTransAuxTriple`, `grassTransAuxTriple_isUnit`,
`grassTrans2`, `grassTrans2_comp_algebraMap`, `grassTripleRingEquiv`, `grassTripleIso`,
`grassTransMorphism2`. (Labels in `task_results/.../Functors.lean.md`.)

## P2 — CLOSEST to completion: finish `grassmannianScheme := D.glued` (re-dispatch Functors lane)
All four GlueData DATA fields now exist & are real (`U,V,f,t,t'`; `f_id,t_id` proven). Only two
**Prop** fields remain, both reduced to ring-level identities:
1. **cocycle** collapses by iso-cancellation to the single ring lemma
   `(grassTrans2 I J K).comp((grassTrans2 J K I).comp(grassTrans2 K I J)) = RingHom.id`. This IS
   `grassmannian_cocycle` (already proven) lifted through 3 localisations. Proof skeleton confirmed
   in-code: `IsLocalization.ringHom_ext` → `(triple-comp).comp algebraMap = algebraMap`, then a
   recursive comp-law stack (`grassTrans2_comp_algebraMap`, `awayToAwayRight_eq`) bottoming at
   `MvPolynomial.ringHom_ext` on the frame variables. ~150 lines — **dispatch as a dedicated lane**
   targeting JUST this ring lemma first (self-contained, axiom-clean), THEN `t_fac`, THEN assemble.
2. **t_fac** — `grassOverlapToTriple ∘ grassTrans = grassTrans2 ∘ (canonical loc map)`, via
   `IsLocalization.ringHom_ext` + `pullbackSpecIso_inv_snd/_fst`. Moderate; do AFTER the cocycle.
Low structural risk: hard geometry (pullback↔Spec triple-overlap) is done. Reversal: if the 3-level
`ringHom_ext` chase stalls, hand off the missing comp-law as the next sub-target.

## P3 — relativeProj: do NOT re-dispatch the cross-S step blind (confirmed gap)
Frame-change transition iso + scheme cocycle are DONE (Lane 1). The remaining step — cross-`S`
GlueData assembly of charts into `relativeProj S V` — is blocked on the genuinely-ABSENT
trivialising affine cover of `S` for locally-free `V` (extracting per-overlap frame matrices `g_{αβ}`
from an `S.Modules`; needs sheaf-`Sym`/local-frame machinery not in Mathlib). It is NOT a
`Basic.lean`-local step. Do not send a prover at it without first settling the cover/frame-extraction
design (planner-level decision); otherwise it thrashes on building Sym-of-a-sheaf.

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign (unchanged, EGA-gated)
- `quot_properness` (2nd conjunct): `IsSeparated relativeProj.structureMorphism` — relativeProj is a
  `sorryAx` stub; only the full BUILD closes it.
- `flatness_local_criterion` (part 2): flat-locus openness (EGA IV 11.1.1) — confirmed absent.
- All §5/§6 stubs (`SheafFlatOver`, `IsLocallyFreeOfRank`, semicontinuity/base-change, regularity,
  flattening) + downstream `grassmannian_separated/_proper/_universalQuotient`/very-ample/represents:
  EGA-III §7 / Serre-vanishing gated; `frontier=0` until a foundational BUILD lands.

## Reusable proof patterns (→ also in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- **`Proj.map` round-trips**: never `rw [← Proj.map_comp]` (dependent-Prop motive fails); use
  `((Proj.map_comp f g _ _).symm).trans ?_`. Collapse a propositionally-`id` `Proj.map` via a
  `subst`-based congruence lemma (`*_congr`) then `Proj.map_id` (proof-irrelevant).
- **`HomogeneousIdeal.map_id`** takes no explicit args: `HomogeneousIdeal.map_id.ge`.
- **Tensor of two `Away`s = `Away` of the product**: `IsLocalization.Away.mul'` +
  `IsLocalization.algEquiv` (give the submonoid `Submonoid.powers (x*y)` explicitly). Budget:
  `set_option synthInstance.maxHeartbeats 1000000 in` (place BEFORE docstring; linter comment AFTER
  the set_option line).
- **GlueData `t'` from localisation pullback**: `pullbackSpecIso ≪≫ Spec.mapIso (ringEquiv…)`;
  cocycle/​t_fac of such `t'` collapse to ring-level identities by `Iso.inv ≫ Iso.hom` cancellation.

## Process note
- Both prover lanes labelled this round "iter-009" (off-by-one, recurring since iter-007). No code
  impact; the user's auto-memory now reads "iter-009" for iter-008 work — harmless, flagged only.
